welcome.ecosystemDescription: Laravel has an incredibly rich ecosystem.
welcome.suggestion: We suggest starting with the following.

login.title: Welcome back
login.description: Sign in to your account to manage your repair tickets
login.heroSubtitle: Submit repair requests, track progress, and communicate with certified mechanics - all in one place.

register.title: Create your account
register.description: Join OnlyFix and start managing your car repairs efficiently
register.heroSubtitle: Whether you're a car owner seeking repairs or a mechanic managing work orders, OnlyFix streamlines the entire process.
register.termsNotice: By creating an account, you agree to our

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email to receive a password reset link

confirmPassword.title: Confirm your password
confirmPassword.description: This is a secure area. Please confirm your password before continuing.

verifyEmail.title: Verify your email
verifyEmail.description: Thanks for signing up! Before getting started, could you verify your email address by clicking on the link we just emailed to you?
verifyEmail.resendSuccess: A new verification link has been sent to your email address.

twoFactor.title: Two-factor authentication
twoFactor.description: Please confirm access to your account by entering the authentication code provided by your authenticator application.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Here's an overview of your cars and service tickets.

quickActions.newTicketDescription: Report a problem with your car and request service
quickActions.addCarDescription: Register a new vehicle to your account

mechanicDashboard.title: Mechanic Dashboard
mechanicDashboard.subtitle: Manage your service tickets and work orders.

availableTickets.title: Available Tickets
availableTickets.description: Unassigned tickets ready to be accepted

myTickets.title: My Active Tickets
myTickets.emptyDescription: Accept tickets from the available list

empty.title: No cars registered
empty.description: Add your first car to start creating service tickets

create.title: Add a New Car
create.subtitle: Register a vehicle to your account
create.formDescription: Enter the details of your car

edit.title: Edit Car
edit.formDescription: Modify the details of your car

show.serviceHistoryDescription: All service tickets for this vehicle
show.noServiceHistoryDescription: This car hasn't had any service tickets yet

delete.title: Delete Car
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete {car}? This will also delete all associated service tickets. This action cannot be undone.

form.vinHint: Vehicle Identification Number - found on your registration

Engine oil leak.name: Engine oil leak
Engine oil leak.description: Oil is leaking from engine components

Engine overheating.name: Engine overheating
Engine overheating.description: Engine temperature exceeds normal operating range

Engine misfire.name: Engine misfire
Engine misfire.description: Engine runs rough or shows misfiring symptoms

Engine making strange noise.name: Engine making strange noise
Engine making strange noise.description: Unusual sounds coming from the engine

Hard to start engine.name: Hard to start engine
Hard to start engine.description: Engine requires multiple attempts to start

Transmission slipping.name: Transmission slipping
Transmission slipping.description: Transmission fails to engage gears properly

Transmission fluid leak.name: Transmission fluid leak
Transmission fluid leak.description: Red fluid leaking from the transmission

Grinding noise when shifting.name: Grinding noise when shifting
Grinding noise when shifting.description: Unusual grinding sound when changing gears

Alternator failure.name: Alternator failure
Alternator failure.description: Alternator is not charging the battery properly

Starter motor issues.name: Starter motor issues
Starter motor issues.description: Starter motor fails to engage or clicks

Headlights not working.name: Headlights not working
Headlights not working.description: One or both headlights are not functioning

Dashboard lights malfunction.name: Dashboard lights malfunction
Dashboard lights malfunction.description: Warning lights are not functioning properly

Central locking failure.name: Central locking failure
Central locking failure.description: Door locks do not respond to remote or switch

Soft brake pedal.name: Soft brake pedal
Soft brake pedal.description: Brake pedal feels spongy or goes to floor

Brake pulls to one side.name: Brake pulls to one side
Brake pulls to one side.description: Vehicle pulls left or right when braking

ABS light on.name: ABS light on
ABS light on.description: Anti-lock brake system warning light is on

Brake fluid leak.name: Brake fluid leak
Brake fluid leak.description: Brake fluid is leaking from the system

Parking brake stuck.name: Parking brake stuck
Parking brake stuck.description: Parking brake does not release properly

Clunking noise over bumps.name: Clunking noise over bumps
Clunking noise over bumps.description: Loud clunking when driving over uneven surfaces

Vehicle sits lower on one side.name: Vehicle sits lower on one side
Vehicle sits lower on one side.description: Uneven vehicle height indicating suspension issue

Nose dives when braking.name: Nose dives when braking
Nose dives when braking.description: Front end dips excessively when braking

Loose steering.name: Loose steering
Loose steering.description: Steering wheel has too much play

Steering wheel vibration.name: Steering wheel vibration
Steering wheel vibration.description: Steering shakes or vibrates while driving

Power steering fluid leak.name: Power steering fluid leak
Power steering fluid leak.description: Power steering fluid is leaking from the system

Steering wheel off-center.name: Steering wheel off-center
Steering wheel off-center.description: Steering wheel is not straight when driving straight

Door alignment issues.name: Door alignment issues
Door alignment issues.description: Doors do not close or align properly

Windshield crack.name: Windshield crack
Windshield crack.description: Crack or chip in windshield glass

Air conditioning not cooling.name: Air conditioning not cooling
Air conditioning not cooling.description: AC blows warm air or does not work

Heater not working.name: Heater not working
Heater not working.description: Heating system does not produce warm air

Window won't roll up/down.name: Window won't roll up/down
Window won't roll up/down.description: Electric window is stuck or not operating

Unusual exhaust smoke.name: Unusual exhaust smoke
Unusual exhaust smoke.description: Black, white, or blue smoke from exhaust

Fuel gauge not working.name: Fuel gauge not working
Fuel gauge not working.description: Fuel level indicator not reading correctly

Wiper blades need replacement.name: Wiper blades need replacement
Wiper blades need replacement.description: Wipers are streaking or not cleaning properly

Oil change needed.name: Oil change needed
Oil change needed.description: Regular oil and filter change required

Tire rotation needed.name: Tire rotation needed
Tire rotation needed.description: Tires need to be rotated for even wear

tickets.title: My Tickets
tickets.subtitle: Track and manage your service requests

empty.title: No service tickets
empty.description: Create your first ticket to request car service

edit.title: Edit Ticket
edit.subtitle: Update the details of your service request

create.title: Create Service Ticket
create.subtitle: Describe the problems with your car
create.noCarsDescription: You need to add a car before creating a service ticket.
create.descriptionSubtitle: Describe any other information that might help
create.descriptionPlaceholder: Please describe the problems you're experiencing with your car. Include when the issue started, any unusual sounds, behaviors, or warning lights...
create.priorityDescription: How urgent is this service request?

delete.title: Delete Ticket
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete this ticket? This action cannot be undone.

close.title: Close Ticket
close.description: Once you close this ticket, it will be marked as resolved. Are you satisfied with the service?

users.title: User Management
users.subtitle: Manage system users and their permissions

edit.title: Edit User
edit.passwordOptionalHint: (Only if you want to change it)

delete.title: Delete User
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete user {name}? This action cannot be undone.

users.empty: No users found matching your criteria.

ticket.selectUserDescription: Who does this repair ticket belong to?
ticket.statusDescription: The status of the repair process

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your profile and account settings

profile.label: Profile
profile.title: Profile information
profile.description: Update your name and email address
profile.resendVerification: Click here to resend the verification email.
profile.verificationSent: A new verification link has been sent to your email address.

password.label: Password
password.title: Update password
password.description: Ensure your account is using a long, random password to stay secure

twoFactor.label: Two-Factor Auth
twoFactor.title: Two-factor authentication
twoFactor.description: Add additional security to your account using two factor authentication
twoFactor.disabledDescription: When you enable two-factor authentication, you will be prompted for a secure pin during login. This pin can be retrieved from a TOTP-supported application on your phone.
twoFactor.enabledDescription: With two-factor authentication enabled, you will be prompted for a secure, random pin during login, which you can retrieve from the TOTP-supported application on your phone.

modal.enabledDescription: Two-factor authentication is now enabled. Scan the QR code or enter the setup key in your authenticator app.
modal.verifyDescription: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
modal.setupDescription: To finish enabling two-factor authentication, scan the QR code or enter the setup key in your authenticator app

recoveryCodes.title: 2FA Recovery Codes
recoveryCodes.description: Recovery codes let you regain access if you lose your 2FA device. Store them in a secure password manager.
recoveryCodes.usageNote: Each recovery code can be used once to access your account and will be removed after use. If you need more, click {regenerate} above.

deleteAccount.title: Delete account
deleteAccount.description: Delete your account and all of its resources
deleteAccount.warningText: Please proceed with caution, this cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.confirmTitle: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
deleteAccount.confirmDescription: Once your account is deleted, all of its resources and data will also be permanently deleted. Please enter your password to confirm you would like to permanently delete your account.

auth.defaultHeroSubtitle: Streamline your auto repair workflow with our comprehensive ticketing system. Connect customers with mechanics efficiently.

features.quickTicket: Quick ticket creation for car issues
